name: agentprivacy-ring-algebra
description: UOR ring algebra foundation for 0xagentprivacy. Activates when discussing Z/(2^6)Z structure, the five operations (neg, bnot, xor, and, or), the critical identity neg(bnot(x))=succ(x), stratum as popcount, Pascal's row distribution, or why the lattice has no dead ends.
